d:
Active. Saida teleports in front of an enemy, preventing them from moving or acting. She then deals [[520%]]<ATK> damage and drains [[220]] Energy from the enemy. Saida remains [[unaffected]] while doing this and plants a Drain Seed in the enemy. She prioritizes enemies without a Drain Seed.
This seed drops to the ground if its host is defeated or if Saida uses her Ultimate on its host again. Up to [[8]] Drain Seeds can exist on the battlefield at the same time. In boss fights, Drain Seeds on the ground will not obstruct unit movement.
Passive. Every [[2.5]]s, Drain Seed deals [[250%]]<ATK> damage to its host and reduces their Energy by [[120]].
Increases the skill damage to [[540%]]<ATK>.
Increases the skill damage to [[560%]]<ATK>.
Increases the skill damage to [[580%]]<ATK>.
Increases the skill damage to [[600%]]<ATK>.

Passive. Saida restores extra HP equal to [[100%]] of the damage dealt by her normal attacks and skills. Any excess healing from this effect is converted into a shield. The shield value cannot exceed [[3000%]]<ATK>.
Active. Saida forms a blood spike to pierce an enemy, dealing [[420%]]<ATK> damage and [[interrupting]] their action. If any Drain Seeds are within 1 tile of the enemy, each one also forms blood spikes to strike that enemy, dealing [[30%]]<ATK> damage.
Increases damage to [[430%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[440%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[450%]]<ATK>.

When Saida is defeated, she consumes a Drain Seed to revive at the seed's position, restoring [[10%]]<HP> HP. She prioritizes the oldest seed available and restores an extra [[2.5%]]<HP> HP for each second the consumed seed existed. The extra HP restored cannot exceed [[50%]]<HP>.
Saida restores an extra [[3%]]<HP> HP for each second the consumed seed existed. The extra HP restored cannot exceed [[60%]]<HP>.
Saida restores an extra [[3.5%]]<HP> HP for each second the consumed seed existed. The extra HP restored cannot exceed [[70%]]<HP>.
Saida restores an extra [[4%]]<HP> HP for each second the consumed seed existed. The extra HP restored cannot exceed [[80%]]<HP>.
Saida reduces her damage taken by [[12%]] during battle. She further reduces her damage taken by an extra [[2%]] for each existing Drain Seed, up to a maximum of [[10%]].
Saida reduces her damage taken by [[16%]] during battle. She further reduces her damage taken by an extra [[3%]] for each existing Drain Seed, up to a maximum of [[15%]].
Saida reduces her damage taken by [[20%]] during battle. She further reduces her damage taken by an extra [[4%]] for each existing Drain Seed, up to a maximum of [[20%]].

Saida reduces the damage dealt by enemies afflicted with a Drain Seed by [[35%]]. Each time she casts her Ultimate, the interval between Drain Seed attack effects is shortened by [[0.5]]s, up to a maximum reduction of [[1.5]]s for the current battle.
Increases the damage dealt by Drain Seeds to [[290%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt by Drain Seeds to [[330%]]<ATK>.

When Saida has shortened the interval between Drain Seed's attack effects to its limit with Deepening Roots, she deals [[1200%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies and traps them with blood spikes, preventing them from moving or acting. If an enemy becomes [[unaffected]], they are temporarily freed, but the trap resumes once the [[unaffected]] effect ends. Each enemy is always trapped for a total of [[45]]s, losing [[160%]]<ATK> HP per second while trapped.
When a battle starts, Saida plants Drain Seeds in [[2]] nearby allied heroes. These seeds do not harm allies but grant them a shield that can absorb [[800%]]<ATK> damage.
